Variables.Name: MaxAgents
Variables.Description: max number of agents supported by crowd

Variables.Name: MaxAgentRadius
Variables.Description: max radius of agent that can be added to crowd

Variables.Name: MaxAvoidedAgents
Variables.Description: max number of neighbor agents for velocity avoidance

Variables.Name: MaxAvoidedWalls
Variables.Description: max number of wall segments for velocity avoidance

Variables.Name: NavmeshCheckInterval
Variables.Description: how often should agents check their position after moving off navmesh?

Variables.Name: PathOptimizationInterval
Variables.Description: how often should agents try to optimize their paths?

Variables.Name: SeparationDirClamp
Variables.Description: clamp separation force to leftright when neighbor is behind (dot between forward and dirToNei, -1 = disabled)

Variables.Name: PathOffsetRadiusMultiplier
Variables.Description: agent radius multiplier for offsetting path around corners

Variables.Name: bResolveCollisions
Variables.Description: should crowd simulation resolve collisions between agents? if not, this will be handled by their movement components
